description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: For purposes of [A.6.1.1.2.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.4 - Root Edit Token Holder Vote](f6dd56ae-ee72-4109-be99-eaf69c92c3be), the circulating supply of GROVE tokens is equal to the total supply of GROVE tokens minus the sum of:
1. Tokens retained by Sky and not yet distributed as token rewards (see [A.2.
.2.2.2.1.2.2 - Sky Retained Tokens And Reward Pools](fb447af6-1581-4711-b73c-dc2e8d65e843)); and
2. Tokens retained in vesting agreements for Grove contributors and not yet distributed; and

For purposes of [A.6.1.1.2.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.4 - Root Edit Token Holder Vote](f6dd56ae-ee72-4109-be99-eaf69c92c3be), the circulating supply of GROVE tokens is equal to the total supply of GROVE tokens minus the sum of:
1. Tokens retained by Sky and not yet distributed as token rewards (see [A.2.8.2.2.2.1.2.2 - Sky Retained Tokens And Reward Pools](fb447af6-1581-4711-b73c-dc2e8d65e843)); and
2. Tokens retained in vesting agreements for Grove contributors and not yet distributed; and
3. Tokens in the Grove SubProxy Account (see [A.6.1.1.2.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account](d143241d-5819-432d-a6ba-892961502838)).
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

2. Tokens retained in vesting agreements for Grove contributors and not yet distributed; and
3. Tokens in the Grove SubProxy Account (see [A.6.1.1.2.2.1.1.3.1.1.2 - SubProxy Account](d143241d-5819-432d-a6ba-892961502838)).
